_comment:
EDIT THIS FILE TO CHANGE ANY TEXT OR LINK ON YOUR PORTFOLIO. After editing, push to Vercel — site updates automatically. HTML uses ... for highlights,
for line breaks. **bold** in project narratives is the orange accent.

site.title: Artem Iskandirov — Product Designer
site.description: Product Designer. Uchi.ru / VK EdTech. Based in Kazan.

cat.name: Artem Iskandirov
cat.bio: Product designer at Uchi.ru / VK EdTech. I work across B2C & B2B, mobile & web — kids edtech, retail AI and design systems. 7+ years in product.
cat.gameSub: You are X · Cat is O · Cat cheats
cat.catchSub: 30 seconds — tap as many as you can

fantasy.name: Artem Iskandirov
fantasy.bio: Wandering craftsman of interfaces — forging realms of kids lore, retail divination & design sigils. Sworn Knight-Senior of the Uchi.ru hold, seven winters at the craft.
meta: Open to far roads · remote keeps · relocation
fantasy.gameSub: You — Sword · Dragon — Sigil · It is no honest beast
fantasy.statusYouWin: The dragon falls. Songs shall be sung.
fantasy.statusCheat: The dragon cheats! It claims one of your sigils.
fantasy.catchSub: 30 seconds — tap as many as you can

projects.title: Uchi.ru
projects.subtitle: Self-learning platform for kids, grades 1–4
projects.problem: Engagement for young learners **stagnated** — lessons felt repetitive, and the product had no unified visual or sound language.
projects.approach: As Senior PD I **led the design system, sound UX and reward mechanics**, and ran a continuous stream of A/B-tested product hypotheses.
projects.outcome: New purchase flow **ARPU +5% · CR +7%** · won **1st place in the internal AI hackathon (₽500K prize)**

projects.title: Miry Avi · Speech
projects.subtitle: Speech-therapy app for preschoolers
projects.problem: Speech therapy at home is hard to sustain — kids lose interest and parents can't keep them practising.
projects.approach: I built the **game logic, level design and retention loops**, plus structural layouts handed off to illustrators.
projects.outcome: Subscriptions **+4%** from a payments redesign · DAU up via progressive grade unlocks

projects.title: Ailet · JedAI
projects.subtitle: AI-vision platform for retail & CPG
projects.problem: Field merchandisers and auditors at major CPG brands worked with **dense data and slow in-store audits**.
projects.approach: I designed the **analytics web platform and the mobile field app**, ran UX research in real stores, and turned design into proper dev-ready documentation.
projects.outcome: **CSAT/CSI +5pp** · support tickets **−8%** · steady task-completion growth in the field

projects.title: Ak Bars · Investments
projects.subtitle: Investments section inside a banking app
projects.problem: The bank wanted more users entering and completing **investment products**, but the flow had high drop-off.
projects.approach: I designed the **investments section** and a scalable UI architecture so new products could be added without redesign.
projects.outcome: Entries to investments **+11%** after the home redesign · checkout drop-off **−12%** · faster purchase flow

projects.title: BARS · Medical IS
projects.subtitle: Medical information system, 12 regions
projects.problem: A medical information system deployed across **12 Russian regions** was hard to use across many professional roles.
projects.approach: I redesigned interfaces for **doctors, nurses and admins**, researching 7+ role scenarios and adapting flows per role.
projects.outcome: **10,000+ users** · routine tasks **−10%** time · positive feedback in 3 of 5 pilot regions · onboarding without manuals

projects.title: Conditional
projects.subtitle: Visual logic builder for non-tech analysts
projects.problem: Analysts had to hand-write **JSON formulas** to ship rules — every change burned engineering time.
projects.approach: I turned the formula syntax into a **visual logic builder** non-tech users could assemble themselves.
projects.outcome: **Zero engineering** dependency to configure rules · faster time-to-ship

projects.title: Portal redesign
projects.subtitle: Global redesign of a detail page
projects.problem: The portal detail page was a wall of data — users couldn't find primary actions or filter.
projects.approach: I rebuilt **information hierarchy, layout, primary CTAs and filters** from scratch.

projects.title: Adaptive tables
projects.subtitle: Dense data on small screens
projects.problem: Complex tabular data didn't fit on phones — field staff had to zoom and pan endlessly.
projects.approach: I designed a **responsive table pattern** adopted across every module.
projects.outcome: Usable dense data on mobile platform-wide

projects.title: Realogram
projects.subtitle: Shelf recognition view
projects.problem: Auditors couldn't tell **what the AI recognised** on a shelf photo — overlays were unreadable.
projects.approach: I designed **layered overlays** so anyone can read recognition results on a real photo.

projects.title: Sound UX
projects.subtitle: Talk at Chulakov Design Meetup
projects.problem: Sound is **the most ignored interface layer** — designers leave it to engineers and lose product feel.
projects.approach: A talk on **how sound and voice affect product metrics** — and how to make it yourself or with neural nets.
projects.outcome: Shared real Uchi.ru sound-UX lessons with the design community

projects.title: Custom Vibrations
projects.subtitle: iOS app for crafting haptics
projects.problem: Designing haptic patterns means describing them in chat — nobody can feel a Figma frame.
projects.approach: I **vibe-coded an iOS app in Cursor + Xcode** to author and feel custom vibrations directly.
projects.outcome: A working tool to test haptics before pitching them

projects.title: Telegram Digester
projects.subtitle: No-code channel-summary bot
projects.problem: My channel feed grew faster than I could read it — important posts slipped through.
projects.approach: I built a **no-code Telegram bot with ChatGPT** that reads channels and sends me automatic digests.
projects.outcome: Daily digest of everything important in **one message**

projects.title: BI Agent
projects.subtitle: Chat-style insights over BI data
projects.problem: Retail BI dashboards are dense — managers want **the answer**, not the whole chart.
projects.approach: I designed and built an **AI agent** that returns just the requested part of a BI dashboard, ChatGPT-style.
projects.outcome: Ask in plain language, get the exact slice of data back
